subject: Galvantula, the EleSpider Pokemon — Unova Bug/Electric-type large yellow spider surrounded by electrical discharge
description: A large yellow spider-like creature crouches at the center of the frame, surrounded by bright electrical arcs and yellow lightning. The creature has a round body with visible leg segments spreading outward. Multiple eyes are discernible on its face. The background is dark, making the electrical glow around the creature the primary light source and the dominant visual element. The lightning radiates outward from the creature's body in multiple directions, creating a dramatic starburst effect.
foreground: large yellow spider creature surrounded by branching electrical arcs
